dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Oh my God. I can't believe this!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Holy crap, holy crap. Is that really me? OMG.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Once I draw on my eyebrows.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: (Temporary Post) How does my makeup look? Could use your feedback again! I tried doing my makeup by following the advice from one of the top posts! How does it look?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Wow, you nailed it! You look so pretty!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: OMG! Are you even the same person? You look stunning!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: You must have some real natural beauty, haha.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Gasp! They think I'm pretty... They think I'm pretty!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: From that day on, I started reading beauty blogs and makeup magazines.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I spent the entire last winter vacation of middle school practicing my makeup.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Welcome all new students! Welcome to Saebom High School.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Whew. And then, my new life began.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Relax, Jugyeong.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Thankfully, I ended up at a school far enough away that hopefully no one will recognize me.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Come to think of it. Since this school is so faraway, I don't have a single friend here.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Everyone looks so close. It'll be hard to approach them.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Oh, well. I'm used to being on my own. I just hope no one picks on me.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, check her out! Wow!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Huh?

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Wait... why is everyone staring at me? Wow.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: She's so pretty! Holy crap. She's beautiful. She's freaking gorgeous! Is her name Jugyeong Lim?

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Me? I'm pretty? They think all that practice during winter vacation paid off big! Yes!

dialogue.speaker: CHAERIN AHN
dialogue.line: Hey, what's your name? I'm Chaerin Ahn!

dialogue.speaker: SUA KANG
dialogue.line: I'm Sua Kang!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: I-I'm Jugyeong Lim.

dialogue.speaker: SUA KANG
dialogue.line: You're super pretty! C-Could I have your number? Heh.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Bonding with the other kids was easy.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Jugyeong Lim at a cafe with Sua. I definitely don't look this good in person, lol.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: That's Jugyeong Lim from Class Two. She's insanely pretty!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Damn, man. Can you introduce me to her?

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Dude! Girl? That girl... she completely ignored me!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Wow, she's so pretty. She's the goddess of Saebom High!

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Don't get your hopes up with girls.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: I'd become pretty well-known.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Ah, it feels great to wash up!

dialogue.speaker: SIS
dialogue.line: Jeez. Seriously, who are you? You look like a totally different person.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: So what? And you'd better not act like you know me when we're in public.

dialogue.speaker: SIS
dialogue.line: Oh yeah? Oh yeah? Well, then I'm gonna take a picture of your real face and show everyone!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Hey, damn it! Hand that over or I'll destroy you!

dialogue.speaker: SIS
dialogue.line: Hey, everyone! Hope you're watching!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: All right, I'll buy you some chicken. Now delete it.

dialogue.speaker: SIS
dialogue.line: Deal. Lala~ Deleted, Your Highness~

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Ugh! That little jerk!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Relax. Relax.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: I'll just finish this chapter.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Wow. This episode's even better.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Of course, there were struggles.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: At home, I could enjoy my hobbies without any worries.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, did you read about how 'AA' Lim and 'B' Kim are dating? I knew those two would end up together!

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: But at school, because I was labeled as the 'pretty girl'...

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Hey, doesn't the food suck today? Tastes like old people food.

dialogue.speaker: UNKNOWN
dialogue.line: Y-Yeah. Ew~

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: This isn't enough. I need to eat more.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Having to maintain my image was exhausting.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Still, thanks to my makeup, it seemed like it would be smooth sailing until third year of high school.

dialogue.speaker: UNCLE
dialogue.line: Where are you going?

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: To a comic shop.

dialogue.speaker: UNCLE
dialogue.line: Bring some ice cream on your way back!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: That little punk isn't even going to pay for it.

dialogue.speaker: NARRATOR
dialogue.line: Until I met that bastard.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Ah~ The smell of a comic shop. This place is heaven!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Let me see new releases.

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: Hmhm~ Gasp! Finally! 'Creepy Tales' by Ito Junji, the horror comic master!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: I-I touched him!

dialogue.speaker: JUGYEONG LIM
dialogue.line: I-Is he... a c-celebrity!?

summary: After a humiliating experience, Jugyeong dedicates her winter break to mastering makeup. She starts high school with a new, beautiful image, quickly becoming popular and known as the "Goddess of Saebom High." However, maintaining this image is exhausting, and she struggles with her sister who knows her secret, until she has an unexpected encounter at a comic shop.
